message:
feat(scheduler): ScopedLocalScheduler in run_loop + local queue fast path test

- Wire ScopedLocalScheduler guard at the top of run_loop() so the
  thread-local CURRENT_LOCAL is set for the duration of the worker
  loop, enabling spawn/wake to route tasks to the local queue
- Flatten let binding in local schedule path (style)
- New test test_local_queue_fast_path verifying:
  - spawn() with ScopedLocalScheduler routes to local queue, not global
  - wake() also uses the local fast path
  - spawn() without guard falls back to global queue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
